decision-tree.root-question: Does the task need diarisation OR word timestamps OR vocab biasing OR sub-300ms streaming?

branch.when: capability.needs_diarisation == true OR capability.needs_word_timestamps == true OR capability.needs_vocab_bias == true OR capability.needs_streaming == true
branch.question: Is real-time streaming <300ms required?
Privacy requires on-prem AND host has GPU?

example.trace: 3-speaker interview + word timestamps + UA vocab boost → Deepgram / AssemblyAI path
